hero.desc: Savor the finest Italian cuisine crafted with passion, tradition, and the freshest seasonal ingredients — right in the heart of the city.

featured.title: Featured Dishes
featured.subtitle: A selection of our most beloved creations, made fresh daily with seasonal ingredients.

dishes.name: Truffle Risotto
dishes.description: Arborio rice slow-cooked with black truffle, parmesan & wild mushrooms.

dishes.name: Branzino al Forno
dishes.description: Whole sea bass roasted with lemon, capers, olives & fresh herbs.

dishes.name: Tagliatelle al Ragù
dishes.description: Hand-rolled pasta with slow-braised beef ragù & aged pecorino.

dishes.name: Burrata & Prosciutto
dishes.description: Imported burrata, San Daniele prosciutto, heirloom tomatoes & basil oil.

values.title: Why Choose Us
values.subtitle: We believe a great cup of coffee is more than a drink — it's a ritual, a moment, and a connection worth savoring.

items.title: Single-Origin Beans
items.description: We source premium single-origin beans directly from farmers across Ethiopia, Colombia, and beyond — traced from crop to cup.

items.title: Expert Baristas
items.description: Our baristas are trained to craft every espresso, pour-over, and latte with precision, consistency, and care.

items.title: Brewed with Love
items.description: From the first grind to the final pour, every cup is made with intention — because you deserve nothing less.

items.title: Your Third Place
items.description: A cozy, welcoming space to work, meet, and unwind — where everyone knows your order and you always feel at home.

menuCta.title: Explore Our Full Menu
menuCta.desc: From antipasti to dolci, our menu is a journey through the best of Italian cuisine. Starters, mains, desserts, wines — it's all waiting for you.

help.title: Help & Accessibility
help.subtitle: Have a question or need assistance? We're committed to making your experience seamless and inclusive for everyone.

faqs.a: Yes — we offer gluten-free, vegetarian, and vegan options. Please inform your server of any allergies when you arrive.
Absolutely. Our entrance, dining room, and restrooms are fully accessible for guests with mobility needs.

faqs.q: Do you offer private dining for events?
faqs.a: We have a private dining room for groups up to 20 guests. Contact us to discuss availability and menus.

help.addressValue: 12 Via Roma, Suite 1, New York, NY
help.accessibilityDesc: La Bella Cucina is fully wheelchair accessible. We provide large-print menus, assistance for visually impaired guests, and a hearing loop system. Please let us know your needs when booking.

footer.desc: Authentic Italian fine dining in the heart of the city. A passion for food, a love for people.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} La Bella Cucina. All rights reserved.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Create an account to enjoy exclusive offers and more
